name: roambrain
description: Org Roam + Emacs personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search. Loose fork of GBrain.

scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile bin/roambrain-darwin-arm64 src/cli.ts && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile bin/roambrain-linux-x64 src/cli.ts
